indicators.name: large window with city view
indicators.rationale: The large window allows natural light to enter, which can disrupt sleep patterns.

indicators.name: marble countertop
indicators.rationale: Marble surfaces are too cold and hard for comfort during sleep.

indicators.name: bar stools
indicators.rationale: Bar stools are not suitable for sleeping.

indicators.name: brick walls
indicators.rationale: Brick walls do not provide a comfortable sleeping environment.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is not well-suited for sleep (primary). The large window allows natural light to enter, which can disrupt sleep patterns. The marble countertop is too cold and hard for comfort during sleep. Bar stools are not suitable for sleeping. Brick walls do not provide a comfortable sleeping environment. Overall, the presence of these features makes the space unsuitable for sleep.
